text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day at a local festival, I chance upon Narita
Brian trying her luck at the shooting gallery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Got it.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
A-another one?! That's insane! She's going to get
all the prizes at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very impressive. Now that I think of it, you were a
good shot even when we were little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nah, you were just bad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... but...

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Another clean hit! Next up is that colossal
beast!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why won't this piggy bank fall?! I need to
hit it in a different spot! One more shot!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't even trying for difficult prizes... Yet you
would get prize after prize despite only aiming for
the big ones.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's because you think too much. Distance this,
angle that... Ever since you were little, you always
overwork that big brain of yours.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Are you saying my head is overly
large?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Pipe down, will you? I'm trying to take down my
last target.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Taking down your target isn't a matter of... logic.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You gotta sniff out their weak spot with your
instincts...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And then fire!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bullet flies through the air and topples the
prize in spectacular fashion.

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
Man, not my best day of business... Well, life's full
of ups and downs. Feel free to take home all the
prizes you shot down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Keep them. I'm only interested in the hunt.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Although, I will be taking that last one.

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
You're really okay with just that? In that case,
drop by anytime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Here you go, Big Sis... Take it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's gotten into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is... a piggy bank? It looks... strangely
familiar...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian, is this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You're quite the sister.
